---
pagetitle: Diary | Yueswater Blog
lang: en
title: Diary
subtitle: Notes from everyday life
search: false
repo-actions: false
listing:
  contents:
  - posts
  - "!index.qmd"
  - "!index-en.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 30
  feed: false
---
